name: Arc.dev
description: Arc.dev — Remote developer hiring marketplace with pre-vetted engineers and team building services.

seo.title: Arc.dev — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Arc.dev: Arc.dev — Remote developer hiring marketplace with pre-vetted engineers and team building services.

when_to_use: Hiring a pre-vetted React developer for a 3-month sprint
Building a remote engineering team for an early-stage startup
Sourcing specialized backend engineers with blockchain skills
Quick staff augmentation to hit a product launch deadline
Finding senior developers without lengthy recruiter processes

pros: Pre-vetted remote engineers reduce screening overhead
cons: Limited pool versus Upwork or LinkedIn
review.verdict: Decent mid-tier vetted marketplace, but Toptal and Turing dominate the premium remote hiring lane.
review.best_for: Startups needing quick senior remote engineer placements without running their own funnel.
review.not_for: Junior hires, freelancer gigs, or teams wanting hourly marketplace pricing transparency.

transparency.reason: Free for devs; employer pricing varies
